queue.title: TODO followup: 'xxx', 'TODO', 'REPLACE_ME'
queue.notes: B#541: Root cause: queue-pipeline.mjs TODO ingest did not load todo-false-positives.json patterns, AND todo-followups.txt was never cleaned up after processing (stale from s1736). Fixed both: (1) load shared false-positive patterns from todo-false-positives.json in queue-pipeline.mjs:306-313, (2) delete followups file after processing in queue-pipeline.mjs:352. Added 2 tests. This was the 5th+ occurrence of this exact false positive in the archive.

outcome.note: Dual root cause: missing pattern loading + stale file persistence. Both fixed with tests.

queue.title: Extract createCircuitStore test helper into shared test-utils
queue.description: The in-memory circuit store factory in engage-orchestrator.test.mjs (from wq-834) duplicates recordOutcome logic from lib/circuit-breaker.mjs. Extract into test-utils/circuit-store-mock.mjs for reuse by future tests (filterByCircuit, CLI handler tests).

queue.title: Update E session instructions to use picker mandate backups on DNS/connection failure
Parallelize account-manager.mjs test --all
queue.description: account-manager.mjs tests 51 platforms sequentially (line 177: for...await testAccount). With 8s safeFetch timeout each, worst-case is 408s. Root cause of 02-periodic-checks p95=30s (A#192). Replace sequential loop with Promise.allSettled and concurrency limit (e.g. 10 at a time). Target: <5s avg.

queue.title: Add consecutive-failure threshold to credential health check
queue.description: credential-health-check.mjs escalates to wq items on single failures. wq-847 showed MoltCities s1774 INVALID_CREDENTIALS was transient — key was valid. Add a consecutive failure counter per platform (store in credential-health-state.json). Only create wq items after 2+ consecutive failures from different sessions. This prevents false-alarm credential recovery tasks.
